text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
A five-square-foot tarp, a headlamp, a
compass-wristwatch, a blanket to warm my legs,
and a thermos containing a hot drink...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
And finally, this small, light-blue cushion, since I
kind of like how it feels.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'll leave my phone here. I don't need anything
that'll disturb me... or cause any glaring lights.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: All I want is to come talk with you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
So, you've got permission for your nighttime
outing. Hehe, it was a cinch since you're so on top
of your paperwork, Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Be careful not to be late coming back. I know I
don't need to tell you, but a reminder never hurts,
right?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I know...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Good to hear. Well, then... have a nice night of
stargazing.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Thanks...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: What?! You're going stargazing tonight, Ayabe?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Booo. And I even went and found some super cute animal vids for us to watch. Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh wait... Is tonight...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Just go to bed, and don't wait up for me like last
time. You can go ahead and turn off the bedroom
light.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...See you.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: The new moon...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
This night comes approximately once every thirty
days. The stars shine so brightly.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Sister... I always feel closer to you during this
special time.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm coming to talk, on this night of the
new moon.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It's something I've always done, even before I
knew about you.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Now it's my custom, a tradition I've never broken
since learning what I lost.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Ah... I thought so.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(I can feel your presence a little more strongly
tonight.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You know... I've decided to make my debut.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm finally going to run in the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
So... I'm going to run for the life you couldn't live,
the races you couldn't race, and for everything
you missed out on.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm going to run for you.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'll run... and win. And I'll dedicate all the honor to
you. So... just wait a little longer.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Watch your big sister closely, okay?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(That's right. I'll keep winning race after race.
Countless victories and the highest honor... I'll
dedicate it all to you.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (That is my purpose. It's my only motivation.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
That's right... I have... some news? I need to tell
you something.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I have a trainer now. It's required in order to
debut.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: My trainer is...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Someone I don't really understand.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A little while has passed since I became Admire
Vega's trainer, and we've begun training seriously
for her debut race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to the talent and stoic attitude she
inherited from her mother and her sharp mind
capable of quickly take in instructions, her
training has progressed very smoothly.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... Phew...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I don't need your praise. Just tell me what's next.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She constantly rejects what she considers
unnecessary interference. It feels like the distance
between us is still large.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It isn't something I can forcefully resolve. I'll have
to first gain her trust if I want to close this gap.
choice_data_list: (I have to make an effort myself.)
(I have to make an effort myself.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that on my mind, there's something that
needs addressing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's something I've noticed in the training sessions
we've had up until now.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I see. So you want to reduce the stress on her legs
caused by her skeletal misalignment...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
As a matter of fact, I also noticed her uneven
posture when she runs.
choice_data_list:
It seems that her left leg has been slightly off
since birth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And ever since, it's been affecting her posture
and causing additional strain on her legs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I also learned from her documents that the skin
on the soles of her feet is thinner than average.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's responsible and independent enough that
she's taking proper care of herself. Thanks to
that, she hasn't experienced any major issues.
Even so...
choice_data_list:
I want to help her reduce some of the strain, if
only a little.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Of course. Hearing that sentiment come from her
trainer is a good sign.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Please come to me if you need help with
anything, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her daily care routine seems sufficient, so I want
to recommend her a more comprehensive
improvement strategy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After chatting a while with Tazuna, I conclude
that...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The best way to help her form might be to
improve the cleats she wears.
choice_data_list:
I could order some custom-fitted cleats to suit
her physical needs!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Yes! And I have a suggestion about that.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
How about you run the idea past Admire Vega's
mother?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Her mother also suffered from the same issue
during her active racing years, so she might have
some good solutions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega's documents already include contact
information for her mother, so I decide to give
her a call and carefully explain the situation.

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Mother
text_block_list.text:
The shoemaker I used to get my own
custom-made cleats from is still taking orders.

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Mother
text_block_list.text:
From what you say, it sounds like putting in an
order might be the best thing to do. I'll give them
a call for you.

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Not at all... If there's anything I can do for my
child, this is certainly it.

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Um, Trainer. This might be a little forward of me,
but...

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Mother
text_block_list.text: Please, do everything you can for her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And with that...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You've ordered me new shoes with custom-made
cleats?
choice_data_list:
I got them specifically made to suit your
physique.

I got them specifically made to suit your
physique.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: When did you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her voice trails off in her confusion. She runs her
fingers through the cleats a few times before
trying them on and dashing off at full speed.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hup!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (The ground is so soft! My legs feel... so fast!)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: They're... easy to run in.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She taps her toes against the ground to test the
feel of the footwear. The look on her face still
appears stiff.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to slowly establish trust between us as we
continue down this path together. But in the
meantime... we charge ahead!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That is my solemn promise.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I don't get you at all.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Nothing.
